snippet.title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai |Varun,Mrunal,Pooja| In Cinemas 5th June
snippet.description:
ūüĒ• Get ready to groove to the ultimate dance song of the year ‚ÄĒ Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go! ūüíÉ‚ú®
From the much-awaited Bollywood entertainer Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, this electrifying track brings back the iconic 90s vibe with a fresh party twist! ūüé∂‚Ě§ÔłŹ

With peppy beats, colorful energy, and vocals that will make you hit repeat, this song is all set to rule your playlists and dance floors! ūüēļūüĒ•

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Releasing In Cinemas Worldwide on 5th June 2026

Song Credits : 
Song Title: Chunnari Chunnari - Let‚Äôs Go!
Music Composer: Akshay & IP
Additional Lyrics: IP Singh
Singers: IP Singh, Jonita Gandhi, Asees Kaur, Sudhir Yaduvanshi, Anuradha Sriram
Music Produced & Arranged: Akshay Raheja, Abhishek Singh
Guitars: Chaitanya Bhaidkar
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Original Music: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics: Sameer Anjaan
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy
Co-Producer: Gaurav Bose (Maximilian Films UK)
DOP: Ayananka Bose
Story & Screenplay Writer: Yunus Sajawal
Dialogue Writer: Farhad Samji
Music: White Noise Collectives, Tanishk Bagchi, Rony Ajnali, Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), Javed - Mohsin, Akshay & IP
Lyrics: Vayu, Jairaj, Mohsin Shaikh, Rony Ajnali & Gill Macchrai (Classy Beats), IP Singh
Director Of Choreography: Remo D'souza, Bosco Martis, Vijay Ganguly
Editor: Ritesh Soni
Head Of Production: Varsha Taurani
Production Designer: Late Rajat Poddar & Parijat Poddar
Action Director: Sunil Rodrigues

Sound Recording & Sound Design:  Parikshit Lavani & Kunal Mehhta (CSD Studio)
Background Score Raju Singh
Costume Designer Aki Narula, Samidha Wangnoo
Associate Producer Prakash Talreja
Executive Producer Sushil Tirwadkar
Line Producer Sudipto (Sid) Sarkar (UK)
Associate Director Aakar Kauoshik
Associate Editor: Sanket Rajadhyaksha
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (Cas)
Casting Director Mukesh Chhabra (Csa) & Rachita Kapoor (UK)
Di Studio : Redefine
Di Colourist Ashirwad Hadkar (Isc)
Vfx Do It Creative Ltd (UK)
Post Producer Murli Shah
Publicity Design: Parass Kanani (  House Of AWE)
Media Consultant : Nilufer Qureshi (Hype)

Marketing Consultant:  Yash Suchak & Suraj Rao (Grey Alchemy)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
Visual Promotions Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)
UK Production Maximilian Films Ltd. 

Lyrics : 
Chunari-Chunari
 
Saari Raen Din
Saara Chaen Mera
Hosh Tabiyat Lutt Ke Lae Gayi,
 
Udti Jaaye Banke Patang,
Kar Mujhko Tang Ye Kya Hai Keh Gayi,
 
Lehraaye Besharmi Se
Tadpaaye Berehmi Se
Chhoo Loon Tu Kehde Jo Zaraa.
 
Aaja Na Chhoo Le Meri Chunari Sanam
Kuchh Na Main Bolun Tujhey Meri Qasam.
 
Aaya Deewaana Darr Pe Tere
Tere Bin Kya Karoon Bataa De Bereham.
 
Mhare Dil Mein Bajee Pichkari,
Rangi Main Poori Thaari Sajna,
Teri Choonar Manay Samjhaa Ri,
Ke Ho Gi Tu Hai Mhaari Sajnaa.

snippet.title: Ghis Ghis Ghis | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar, Akshara Singh | Vikram Montrose | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. ūüĒ•ūüé∂ Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it‚Äôs a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

Presenting the ultimate collaboration of the year, Bollywood Khiladi Akshay Kumar teams up with the undisputed queen of Bhojpuri cinema, Akshara Singh. ūüĒ•ūüé∂ Ghis Ghis Ghis from 'Welcome to the Jungle' sung by Vikram Montrose and Supriya Pathak, with catchy lyrics by Abhinav Shekhar, is not just a song; it‚Äôs a high-octane Bollywood-Bhojpuri celebration packed with desi swag, electrifying energy, and nonstop entertainment.

#GhisGhisGhis #AkshayKumar #AksharaSingh #WelcomeToTheJungle #BollywoodSong #BollywoodDanceSong #BhojpuriSong #BhojpuriDanceSong #PartySong #DanceSong #BollywoodNewSong

snippet.description:

Manoj Bajpayee brings to life the untold story of the brave unsung hero who saved India from bankruptcy.

snippet.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
snippet.description:
‚ÄúBetween prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam‚ÄĚ.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab 
Singers: Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam
Rap performed and written by Haris Saleem (Street Academics) 
Additional Vocals: Ayshath Safa and Vichuuuh

Bouzouki, Mandolin, Oud, Rabab, Saz: Tapas Roy 
Bulbul: Kishore Mohite 
Guitars and Bass: Sumesh Parameswar

Special Thanks to Ayshath Safa

en.title: HAMDAM (Official Music Video) - Hesham Abdul Wahab, Hanan Shaah, Shafi Kollam, HarisSaleem, Zakariya
en.description:
‚ÄúBetween prayers and memories, there lives a Hamdam‚ÄĚ.

Celebrate this Bakrid with "HAMDAM," a grand audio-visual anthem from Aachus Production that beautifully bridges traditional festive warmth with modern global sounds to deliver a powerful message of peace, love, and togetherness.

Composed and performed by Hesham Abdul Wahab, the track features the soulful vocals of Hanan Shaah, moving Malayalam lyrics by Shafi Kollam, and an energetic English rap verse by veteran artist Haris Saleem (Street Academics). Bringing this melody to life on screen is award-winning filmmaker Zakariya in his music video directorial debut, transforming "HAMDAM" into a stunning, cinematic celebration of community.

Listen to HAMDAM: https://tuneabl.com/stream-hamdam

Music Credits:
Song Composed, Arranged and produced by Hesham Abdul wahab

snippet.title: Mango Pachcha - Official Trailer | Sanchith | Viveka | KRG Studios | Supriyanvi
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe ūüĎČ https://bit.ly/Saregama_Kannada

From the streets of Mysore to the shadows behind power,
a story filled with emotions, chaos, family, politics & rebellion is ready to unfoldūüĒ•

Supriyanvi Picture Studios and KRG Studios proudly present the official trailer of Mango Pachcha
Introducing Sanchit Sanjeev ‚ÄĒ a fresh talent stepping into cinema with fire, intensity and honesty filled with emotion, rage, innocence and madness ‚ÄĒ making a striking debut on the big screen.

‚ÄúPeople with power win wars.
People with willpower build empires.‚ÄĚ

Mysuru 2001-02: Mango Pachcha chronicles the saga of loyalty, deceit and power spanning over a decade on a local empire.

snippet.description:
#PerfectPartnerTrailer #SushmaGopal #RishiNarayan  #TeluguWebSeries2026 #TeluguShortFilms2026 #InfinitumMedia 

"Perfect Partner" is an Upcoming Telugu Romcom Web Series Featuring Sushma Gopal & Rishi Narayan as leads.

Cast: Sushma Gopal, Rishi Narayan, Chandu SMS, Sravanthi, Devi

Producer: Vandana Banduru

Writen by Tej Surya

Directed by Sai Krishna vemparala

Dop: Vinay Sarukolla

Music: Akshay malipeddi 

Editing: MA Vijay Kumar

Di: Nagarjuna Reddy Avula

Motion Graphics: Venkata Koushik

Pulicity Designer: Nikhil Chotu.

Dubbing Engineer: Venkat, Bhaskar 

Executive Producer: Rahul Nimmakuri

Presented by Infinitum Network Solutions.

snippet.title: Made in India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer | Naseeruddin Shah, Jim Sarbh | Amazon MX Player
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents 
Made In India: A Titan Story - Official Trailer 

Starring: Jim Sarbh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vaibhav Tatwawadi, Namita Dubey, Kaveri Seth, Lakshvir Saran
Production House: Almighty Motion Picture & T-Series Films
Produced By: Prabhleen Sandhu, Bhushan Kumar, Kishan Kumar
Written By: Karan Vyas
Directed By: Robbie Grewal
Genre: Biography

About Made In India: A Titan Story - 
Set in Pre-liberalised India, TITAN is ‚ÄúIndia‚Äôs First Start-up story‚ÄĚ where India was at the cusp of an economic & social change. The show follows the journey of Xerxes Desai, who was tasked with reviving Tata Press but he ends up transforming the failing venture by pivoting to a totally new category, watches. Facing bureaucratic hurdles, market challenges, and personal sacrifices, Xerxes‚Äô relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation culminates in the birth of iconic brands like Sonata and the revolutionary Titan Edge, eventually leading to his name becoming the gold standard of Indian ingenuity & resilience. 

About Amazon MX Player -
Amazon MX Player is India‚Äôs leading free, premium, ad-supported streaming entertainment platform, offering a massive library of trending web series, reality shows, movies, and international content ‚ÄĒ all FREE to watch. From youth hits and binge-worthy dramas to reality competition shows, Amazon MX Player is home to some of India‚Äôs most popular titles including Hip Hop India, Case Toh Banta Hai, Playground, Battleground, Crushed, Gutar Gu, Rise and Fall, Sisterhood, Campus Beats, First Copy, Pyar Ka Professor, Jamnapaar, I-Popstar, Aukaat Ke Bahar and many more. Love international content? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global shows dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu‚ÄĒincluding fan-favourites like Our Secret, Gen Z, Time To Fall In Love, W: Two Worlds Apart, My Deskmate, and more! With new shows dropping regularly across genres like romance, action, comedy, crime, thriller, K-drama, youth drama, and reality entertainment ‚ÄĒ there‚Äôs always something exciting to stream.

Lyrics:

Jeene ki hai tu hi vajah
Jeena tere liye
Main kya kahun ke yaar tu
Hai Kya Mere Liye

Zamane me kahin
Meri tarah kabhi
Chahega na koi
Tujhko

Jaise maine diya
Vaise poori tarah
Dil dega na koi
Tujhko

Tujhko..
Jab Se Mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana Jahan..
Tujhko..

Subah ki saari furtiyan
Bekhudi har shaam ki
Na ho tere saath mein
Toh meri kis kaam ki

Uthe jo mera har qadam
Tere sang shuruat me
Haath daale Haath me
Fiqr kya anjaam ki

Mujh mein zyaada ab tu hi hai
Jitna main hoon voh kyun hi hai
Kuch aisa kar main dhoondhoon bhi toh
Paun na khudh ko..

Tu hi toh aasman
Tu hi meri zameen 
Maana hai Zindagi
Tujhko..

Bin maange har dua
Poori hui meri
Paaya jo humnasheen
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Jab se mila..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..
Maana jahan..
Tujhko..

Tujhko..

Galatiyan bhi teri
Main gawara karun
Ye khata hi sahi, par dobara karun

Kya karun sarphira
Ishq hi hai mera
Izhaar ka yahi tareeqa hai mera..

Aankhon ki hai tu raushni
Tu hi toh khaab hai
Main hoon agar savaal toh
Tu hi jawaab hai..


¬© 2026 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd., Under Exclusive License from Mad for Mussic

Shri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana | Hanuman Bhajan for Energy, Bhakti & Positivity | Sanatan Music

‚ÄúShri Ram Ki Gali Mein Tum Jana Wahan Nachte Milenge Hanumana‚ÄĚ is a joyful and powerful Hanuman bhajan filled with Ram bhakti, celebration, and devotional energy. This song beautifully shows the deep love of Hanuman ji for Shri Ram ‚ÄĒ where the name of Ram is sung, Hanuman is always present with devotion, strength, and divine joy.

This Hanuman bhajan is perfect for morning devotion, Tuesday/Saturday puja, Ram bhakti gatherings, satsang, festive playlists, workout motivation, or anytime you want to fill your space with high-energy bhakti.

‚ú® Why listen to this Hanuman bhajan:
‚ÄĘ Brings energetic Ram bhakti and powerful devotional vibes
‚ÄĘ Perfect for Tuesday/Saturday puja, satsang, and daily devotion
‚ÄĘ Helps build courage, positivity, and inner strength
‚ÄĘ Creates an uplifting atmosphere filled with Hanuman ji‚Äôs protection and grace

ūüéß Play it loud, chant along, and feel the energy ‚ÄĒ wherever Shri Ram‚Äôs name is remembered, Hanuman ji‚Äôs devotion comes alive.

snippet.title: Tu Bewafa Hai ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Tu Bewafa Hai ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---


Tu bewafa hai‚Ä¶
ye baat ab
dil ko samajh aa gayi.

Jise humne
apni duniya maana‚Ä¶
usi ne
hume tanha chhod diya.

Mohabbat sachchi thi meri‚Ä¶
par tera saath
sirf ek jhootha ehsaas nikla.

‚ÄúTu Bewafa Hai‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo pyaar mein
toot kar bhi
sirf wafa karta raha.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
bewafai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

humne dil diya tha‚Ä¶
tumne dard de diya‚Ä¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein bewafai mili ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.title: Zaroori Tha (Music Video) Rahat Fateh Ali Khan | Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon | Back 2 Love
snippet.description:
Aaj hum lekar aaye hain ustad Rahat Fateh Ali Khan ka one of the most iconic and heartbreaking tracks "Zaroori Tha". Agar aapne kabhi sachha pyaar kiya hai aur us dard ko mehsoos kiya hai, toh yeh gaana seedha aapke dil ko chhoo jayega. ūü•ļūüíĒ

Featuring the amazing Gauahar Khan and Kushal Tandon, yeh video ek aisi adhuri love story bayaan karta hai jo aapko emotional kar degi. Rahat Sahab ki magical voice aur deep lyrics ka yeh combo sahi mein next level hai!

Aapko is gaane ka kaunsa part sabse best laga? Hamein Comments mein zaroor batayein! ūüĎá

Credits:
Performed by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan
Written by Khalil ur Rehman, Sahir Ali Bagga
Produced by Rahat Fateh Ali KhanSalman Ahmed

(C) 2014 Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Maahi Mere Dholna

Chori Nahin Ki Hai

Jora Jori Nahin Ki Hai

Maine Beqaraar Karke

Ab Tere Naal Ve

snippet.title: Update! Heroes Unlock Earlier, Extra Builder and Gold Pass Changes!
snippet.description:
A New Clash of Clans Update brings Heroes at Town Hall 4, Gold Pass Changes, Re-engagement Improvements and an Extra Builder for the Builder Base. Judo Sloth Gaming breaks down the full update details which is certainly a different one; this is a mandatory update but clearly tailored towards new and returning players. We know an Update is coming in June, and there has been a hint towards Global Chat as well as Ore improvements, such as from Hero Upgrades. Let me know what you think of this one though. Clash On!

Second Channel ‚Ėļ https://www.youtube.com/@JudoSloth.2

Suggested Videos: 
Balance Changes with the Update: https://youtu.be/3kfgvXnISC0
Global Chat, Ore from Hero Upgrades and More: https://youtu.be/RTeTt1rxZJs

Thank you for using Code 'Judo' in Clash of Clans to support me.
Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 
In Clash of Clans: https://bit.ly/CodeJudo

I'm part of Supercell's Creators Program; find more information here: https://creators.supercell.com/en/supercell-partner

Join 'The Dojo' to gain Exclusive Perks by becoming a Member of the Judo Sloth Gaming YT Channel: https://www.youtube.com/judosloth/join

My Clash of Clans Playlists
Clash Explained: https://bit.ly/ClashExplained
Base Upgrading Advice: https://bit.ly/UpgradeBase
Tip for Everything Series: https://bit.ly/TipsForEverything

Watch my Livestreams on Twitch and Facebook:
TWITCH ‚Ėļ https://www.twitch.tv/judosloth
FACEBOOK ‚Ėļ https://www.facebook.com/JudoSloth

Follow me on Social Media:
TWITTER ‚Ėļ https://twitter.com/JudoSloth
INSTAGRAM ‚Ėļ https://www.instagram.com/judosloth
DISCORD ‚Ėļ https://discord.gg/JudoSloth

#ClashOfClans #CoC #SupercellPartner

Video Chapters:
0:00 Update and Extra Builder
2:01 Heroes Unlock Earlier - Stats and Upgrade Explained
5:38 New Re-engagement Event for Returning Players
6:40 Gold Pass Improvements
8:05 Balance Changes and Free Items from SC Store

‚Ėļ Judo Sloth Gaming is a mobile gaming channel focused on Clash of Clans. You will see a variety of videos focused on being Educational but Entertaining! You will find Informational Guides on Everything in CoC. Attack Strategies, 3 Star Attacks, Farming or Upgrade Advice, Lets Play and Update News - you'll want to Subscribe to see it all. Clash On!

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Deep Laath tere gaane te, teri basai ne hota naaz chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

snippet.title: 1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP,  over 1000 players have been captured and trapped inside the largest prison on the server. This is the full story of how I escaped Purgatory...

1000 Players Simulate PRISON in Hardcore Minecraft


Unstable SMP Members
‚ěú @wemmbumc 
‚ěú @FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú @ParrotX2 
‚ěú @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features: @jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @devMCchamp2 ItsAli @found2fast(twitch) @n3tm3tr1x (https://www.youtube.com/@n3tm3tr1x) & all of the trusted members!

music: 
Hollow Knight: Silksong soundtrack by Christopher Larkin (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q6is6K8jbho&pp=ygUTc2lsa3Nvbmcgc291bmR0cmFjaw%3D%3D)
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

spoke
